acceptance.assertion: A versioned contract permits aggregate-only public region context only when an explicit source, provenance, observed-at value, public-use basis and bounded region vocabulary are present; missing, stale, conflicting or unsourced context fails closed.
Aggregate-only context remains outside the canonical CommonProject location model and cannot be serialized, queried or displayed as exact, approximate or extent project geometry.
The context exposes no member identities, hidden coordinates, project anchors or reverse-geocodable small-area clues and obeys k=5, coarsening and complement-differencing protections before release.
Context may contribute only to planet, macroregion and region aggregate impressions and dissolves before local or focus views, where only existing truthful public points, zones and extents remain.
Country or regional membership is never derived from names, domains, language, network endpoints or private metadata; source-backed context is visibly distinguished from geometry-derived buckets.

Search, Commons-type and intent filters count each visible CommonProject identity at most once across geometry-derived and source-bound aggregate inputs, with deterministic conflict resolution and no double counting.

Contract, privacy, stale-source, conflict, hidden-location, filter-parity, text-equivalent and keyboard/touch tests prove fail-closed behavior and expose source/coverage limits without relying on colour alone.

Closeout binds the complete diff digest to the exact PR head, records green CI and review, identifies the merge and deployment commits and performs production readback without claiming regional completeness.

approval.note: Registration does not authorize unsourced regional placement. Implement only after a reviewed provenance, privacy, freshness and semantic-zoom contract proves that aggregate-only context cannot be interpreted as project geometry or exact country membership.

goal: Define and implement a provenance-bound aggregate-only public region context for Commons that lack releasable public geometry, so planet-to-region impressions can become more representative without adding inferred locations, exposing member identities or changing the canonical CommonProject location model.

metadata.source: Commonworld geographic impressions T018 closeout follow-up

title: Add source-bound aggregate-only public region context
